examples: The plasmoids on the earthward side of the neutral line move toward the earth and coalesce with the reconnection region near the earth.
The shimmering water spills earthward, splashes into the bottom of the waiting glass pitcher on the tabletop.
This wire draws down "electrical fire" from the clouds, the charge being conducted earthward along the kite's rain-soaked string.
To nail the point, he hurled the Bunin book against the wall and watched while it fluttered earthward like a stricken bird.
